title: festuca valesiaca f. hirtula
intro: Festuca valesiaca f. hirtula, also known as hairy meadow-grass or rough meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the Festuca valesiaca plant. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca valesiaca f. hirtula include the potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
